tier_legend.R: true animation (Runway/SVD) — key beats only, <=10% total
tier_legend.M: moving still (Ken Burns / 2.5D parallax / drifting light/dust) — default
tier_legend.K: motion graphics rendered in Remotion (the return curve, Ponzi loop diagram, numbers, timeline, quote/citation cards, captions)

recurring_hero_motif: THE LINE — an impossibly smooth, always-rising return curve. It opens the film, returns at each act as a visual refrain, and in the ending is revealed as the warning sign. Rendered in Remotion (tier K) so it is exact and animatable; never a generated image.
image_pipeline: SDXL local (Windows RTX 4090, ComfyUI/API), fully Codex-automatable — NO Midjourney. RealVisXL/JuggernautXL, locked seed family for unity, 3-4 candidates per shot -> select best -> R-ESRGAN 4x -> 1080p. See sdxl_prompts.v001.md. ALL people are anonymous silhouettes (no real-person likeness, invariant 11). Charts/diagrams/timeline/numbers/quote+citation cards/captions are Remotion (tier K), NOT generated images. Palette dark + gold; NO pink anywhere.

sections.visual_spine: The Line appears and climbs; one silhouette studies it while a crowd sees only 'safe'. Disclaimer card.
Trusted institutions (bank/university/charity as symbols) pour money toward a calm golden figure-as-silhouette; thesis card 'steadiness was the trick'.

The respectable name: trading-floor heritage, the invite-only 'club' door, the slow dependable climb vs jagged real markets; professional victims as silhouettes lowering their guard. Ends on the question 'how?'.

The hidden system: money into a bank account, almost no trades; the Ponzi loop diagram (new hands -> old hands); fabricated statements/confirmations; the $65B-vs-$17.5B reveal as a number that shrinks from illusion to cash; the built-in fatal math.

The analyst does the math (calculator, the too-smooth line annotated as impossible); warning letters travel to a vast institutional facade (SEC) and go unread; the watchdog asleep; OIG finding = failure not corruption.

2008 panic, withdrawals drain an empty vault; confession; arrest; courthouse + plea (11 felonies); 150-year card; death-in-prison beat; then the surprising clawback recovery (coins flowing back) with the honest caveat.
The Line returns; risk-vs-reward contrast; the takeaway card 'too smooth = warning'; analyst vs regulator split; subscribe/next-episode CTA.

animation_estimate: ~5 Runway/SVD beats + Remotion motion graphics; true animation ~4-5% of 126 (well within 10% cap). Most motion is tier M (moving stills) and tier K (Remotion graphics).

silence_beats: before 'he wasn't really investing the money at all'
